skills.name: baihuan-bianjian-naming
skills.description: 八还辨见法用于帮助当事人区分"所见"（变化）与"能见"（常住）——把一切"所见"归还其来源，最后认出能见之性本身。Triggers on 当事人被情绪/念头淹没、需要从"在变化中"切换到"观者位置"的场景。

skills.name: consciousness-transformation-diagnosis
skills.description: 转识成智诊断法，用于定位来访者的认知模式在八识结构中的层次，并判断转化的可能方向——是前五识（感知）、第六识（思维）、第七识（我执）还是第八识（种子）需要转化。Triggers on 需要进行深度认知工作、需要进行次第性修行规划、或需要判断来访者在哪个修道阶段场景。

skills.name: diamond-sutra-no-dwelling
skills.description: 金刚经"无住"心法用于破除"心有所执"——不是否定现象，是不应住相；应无所住而生其心。Triggers on 当事人执著于"必须得到什么"、焦虑于"失去什么"、或陷入"如梦幻泡影"的虚无主义场景。

skills.name: eight-consciousness-diagnosis
skills.description: 瑜伽师地论八识体系用于诊断认知结构——从前五识（感知层）到第六意识（思维层）、第七末那识（我执层）、第八阿赖耶识（种子层），定位认知卡点所在层次。Triggers on 当事人认知模式不清晰、反复在同一点卡住、需要系统性认知诊断的场景。

skills.name: madhyamaka-four-fallacies
skills.description: 中观"四句破"法，用于破除当事人的边见——常见（实有）、断见（虚无）、一异（同一/分离）、来去（来/去）。Triggers on 当事人陷入"必须怎样"或"一切都无意义"、非黑即白思维、需要打破极端二元对立场景。

skills.name: mind-world-analysis
skills.description: 唯识"心物一元"分析法，用于诊断来访者"心"与"境"的关系——是心随境转，还是境随心现？通过四分结构（相分/见分/自证分/证自证分）定位认知错位。Triggers on 当事人把外部事件当成"客观压力"、觉得"环境决定我的情绪"、或陷入"都是别人的问题"场景。

skills.name: qichu-zhengxin-deconstruction
skills.description: 七处征心法用于破除当事人"心有所住"的实体化认知——心不在内、不在外、不在中间、不在任何一处。Triggers on 当事人执著于"我的心在某事/某人/某处"、将情绪或念头对象化为实体的场景。

skills.name: six-constituents-diagnosis
skills.description: 六根六尘六识诊断法，用于精准定位认知卡点在根（感官）、尘（对象）、还是识（认知功能）层。Triggers on 当事人感知扭曲、认知错位、需要区分"感知问题"、"思维问题"、"意识问题"的场景。

skills.name: aesthetic-judgment-analysis
skills.description: 基于康德审美判断四契机的审美判断分析框架

skills.name: art-criticism-framework
skills.description: 基于杜威经验美学的四层艺术批评框架

skills.name: tragic-spirit-assessment
skills.description: 基于尼采日神与酒神精神的创造力与生活处境评估框架

skills.name: aristotle-virtue-test
skills.description: 亚里士多德德性检验用于判断某行为或人格特质是否构成德性。通过中庸之道、功能论证与实践智慧三个维度评估行为是否适度、是否促进人的优秀功能、是否在具体情境中展现正确判断。Triggers on 需要判断某行为是否道德、评估某种品质是否为德性、或进行品格伦理分析的场景。

skills.name: justice-principle-test
skills.description: 罗尔斯正义原则检验用于评估社会基本结构的公正性。依次检验平等自由原则与差别原则，判断某社会安排是否满足正义二原则。Triggers on 评估社会政策、分配方案、公共制度设计的公正性，或分析为何某些不平等是或不是正义的。

skills.name: liberalism-analysis
skills.description: 自由主义论证分析用于检验某项限制自由的措施是否具有正当性。通过伤害原则与伤害原则的两个限制条件，判断国家干预个人自由的正当边界。Triggers on 讨论言论自由、行为自由、隐私权等与法律限制边界相关的问题。

skills.name: pleasure-calculus
skills.description: 苦乐计算法（hedonic calculus）用于量化选项的道德价值。通过七个维度评估不同行动的快乐/痛苦产出，判断何者符合功利原则。Triggers on 需要在多个选项间做道德权衡、评估政策/行为的成本效益、或分析功利主义论证的场景。

skills.name: veil-of-ignorance-analysis
skills.description: 无知之幕分析用于检验政治原则或社会安排的公正性。在假设参与者不知道自身社会地位、天赋、价值观的条件下，推断哪些原则会被理性个体选择。Triggers on 需要论证某项政策是否公正、检验社会安排的合法性、或进行制度设计的问题。

skills.name: allegory-of-cave-analysis
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 洞穴寓言、理型论、真理与幻象，如哲学思考、教育理念、社会批判等。Apply this skill to analyze situations using Plato's Allegory of the Cave, understanding the journey from ignorance to enlightenment.

skills.name: categorical-imperative-test
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 道德判断、伦理原则、绝对命令，如道德困境分析、行为准则制定、伦理决策等。Apply this skill to evaluate the morality of actions using Kant's categorical imperative: universalizability, humanity as end, and kingdom of ends.

skills.name: dasein-analysis
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 此在分析、存在之问、技术批判，如存在焦虑、技术反思、本真性探索等。Apply this skill to analyze human existence using Heidegger's concept of Dasein, understanding being-in-the-world and authenticity.

skills.name: existentialism-analysis
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 存在先于本质、自由、责任，如人生意义探索、道德决策、自我认同等。Apply this skill to analyze situations using Sartre's existentialist philosophy, emphasizing radical freedom and responsibility.

skills.name: golden-mean-analysis
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 中庸之道、德性伦理、实践智慧，如道德决策、品格培养、生活方式选择等。Apply this skill to analyze situations using Aristotle's concept of the golden mean, finding the balance between extremes.

skills.name: qiwu-analysis
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 齐物论、相对主义、超越对立，如哲学争论、价值判断、认知偏差等。Apply this skill to help users transcend binary thinking and see the equality of opposites.

skills.name: reverse-thinking
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 逆向思维、反向思考、对立转化，如问题解决、策略制定、创新思维等。Apply this skill to help users see problems from opposite perspectives and discover unconventional solutions.

skills.name: uselessness-paradox
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 无用之用、价值重估、非功利视角，如创新思维、人生意义、资源分配等。Apply this skill to help users discover hidden value in seemingly useless things.

skills.name: cbt-cognitive-distortion
skills.description: 识别情境下的"自动思维"，对照 10 类常见认知扭曲，使用证据法/替代法生成更平衡的思维，并设计行为实验验证。

skills.name: dual-system-analysis
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 双系统思维、快慢思考、认知偏差，如决策分析、思维质量提升、认知训练等。Apply this skill to help users understand and balance their fast and slow thinking systems for better decision-making.

skills.name: flow-conditions-assessment
skills.description: 评估一项活动/任务是否具备进入心流的 8 个条件，找出短板，设计可执行的环境与流程改造，让"沉浸投入"可被复制。

skills.name: individuation-guidance
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 个体化、人格整合、自我实现，如心理成长、自我探索、人格发展等。Apply this skill to guide users through the individuation process, integrating conscious and unconscious aspects of personality.

skills.name: jungian-archetype-identification
skills.description: 在叙事、梦、人物或个人困境中识别荣格原型（阴影/阿尼玛/阿尼姆斯/人格面具/自性/英雄/智慧老人等），用以理解深层心理动力。

skills.name: maslow-needs-diagnosis
skills.description: 对个人/团队/产品所处困境进行需求层次诊断，定位"卡在哪一层"，给出对应的修复或满足策略，避免错位干预。

skills.name: unconscious-analysis
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 潜意识分析、梦境解析、防御机制，如心理分析、自我探索、人格理解等。Apply this skill to analyze unconscious motivations, dreams, and defense mechanisms based on Freud's psychoanalytic theory.

skills.name: biguan-meditation
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 壁观、禅修、心如墙壁，如禅修指导、心灵成长、压力管理等。Apply this skill to guide users in the practice of wall-gazing meditation, cultivating a mind like a wall that does not arise deluded thoughts.

skills.name: bodhisattva-path-guidance
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 菩提道灯、三士道、菩萨道修行，如修行指导、心灵成长、宗教实践等。Apply this skill to guide users through the bodhisattva path as taught by Atiśa, from initial motivation to final enlightenment.

skills.name: dependent-origination-analysis
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 缘起法、因缘和合、无我，如哲学思考、心理分析、因果关系分析等。Apply this skill to analyze phenomena through the lens of dependent origination, understanding how everything arises from conditions.

skills.name: dzogchen-guidance
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 大圆满、心性认识、直接解脱，如禅修指导、心灵成长、宗教实践等。Apply this skill to guide users in the practice of Dzogchen, recognizing the innate purity and perfection of mind.

skills.name: lamrim-stages
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 修行次第、菩提道次第、成佛道路，如修行指导、心灵成长、宗教实践等。Apply this skill to guide users through the gradual path to enlightenment, from initial motivation to final realization.

skills.name: ordinary-mind-guidance
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 平常心是道、日常修行、自然生活，如生活禅、压力管理、心灵成长等。Apply this skill to guide users in cultivating ordinary mind, finding the way in everyday life.

skills.name: softness-overcomes-hardness
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 以柔克刚、柔性策略、持久韧性，如冲突解决、竞争策略、个人成长等。Apply this skill to help users adopt soft, flexible approaches that overcome rigid, forceful opposition.

skills.name: wuwei-guidance
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 无为而治、顺应自然、减少干预，如管理决策、生活指导、政策制定等。Apply this skill to guide users toward non-coercive, natural approaches that align with underlying patterns rather than forcing outcomes.

skills.name: xiaoyao-guidance
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 逍遥游、精神自由、超越束缚，如心灵成长、压力管理、人生境界等。Apply this skill to help users achieve spiritual freedom and transcend worldly constraints.

skills.name: class-analysis
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 阶级分析、社会分层、阶级斗争，如社会不平等分析、政治经济学分析、历史唯物主义应用等。Apply this skill to analyze social structures through the lens of class relations, power dynamics, and historical materialism.

skills.name: communicative-action-analysis
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 交往理性、公共领域、沟通行动，如公共讨论、民主协商、冲突解决等。Apply this skill to analyze communicative action and rational discourse, promoting mutual understanding and consensus.

skills.name: discipline-analysis
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 规训、权力/知识、生命政治，如社会控制分析、机构批判、身份政治等。Apply this skill to analyze disciplinary power and its effects on individuals and society, based on Foucault's theories.

skills.name: liquid-modernity-analysis
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 液态现代性、消费社会、全球化，如社会变迁分析、文化研究、个人身份认同等。Apply this skill to analyze the characteristics of liquid modernity, including fluidity, uncertainty, and individualization.

skills.name: social-fact-analysis
skills.description: Triggers on requests to 社会事实、集体意识、社会整合，如社会问题分析、文化研究、社会政策评估等。Apply this skill to analyze social phenomena as social facts, understanding how they constrain and shape individual behavior.

skills.name: dogen-presence
skills.description: 道元"当下圆满"法，用于帮助当事人看到"此时此地的存在本身已经是完整的"。Triggers on 当事人无法接受当下的自己、觉得"现在的我不配"、需要"成为更好的自己"才能幸福的场景。

skills.name: dogen-shikantaza
skills.description: 道元"只管打坐"法，用于帮助当事人从"追求"切换到"存在"，从"做什么"切换到"只是在这里"。Triggers on 当事人陷入无尽的目标追求、需要停下来、当事人把"活着"当作"要达到某个状态"的场景。

skills.name: hui-neng-no-dwelling
skills.description: 慧能"无住"心法，用于辨别执念的"心住何处"，引导回到不执不弃的当下。Triggers on 当事人陷入执念、反复纠结、无法放下某事某相的场景。

skills.name: hui-neng-ordinary-mind
skills.description: 慧能"平常心是道"心法，用于引导当事人放下"特殊化"心态，回归当下日常。Triggers on 当事人觉得自己"不够好"、"不够格"、需要"达到某种状态"才能做某事，或陷入表演型人格、在意他人眼光的场景。

skills.name: hui-neng-sudden-awakening
skills.description: 慧能"顿悟"心法，用于辨别来访者是否落入渐修迷执，或是否有当下开悟的端倪。Triggers on 来访者执着于"修行进度"、觉得自己"还没准备好"、或需要打破"我必须先XXX才能开悟"的信念束缚的场景。

skills.name: linji-no-thing
skills.description: 临济"无事是贵人"法，用于在当事人内心充满杂念焦虑、不断在"求"什么的时候，当头棒喝"莫觅"。Triggers on 当事人陷入无尽的焦虑、担忧、追求，或者反复寻求外部确认（求佛、求法、求师）的场景。

skills.name: linji-pointer-blow
skills.description: 临济"棒喝当下"法，用于在当事人过度思考、头脑分析过度、需要从思维切换到直接体验的时刻。Triggers on 当事人反复在"想"中打转、无法行动、需要打破思维循环的场景。

skills.name: milarepa-alchemy
skills.description: 米拉日巴"苦行炼金"法，用于将痛苦转化为修行道用。Triggers on 当事人正在经历重大挫折、损失、疾病或苦难，需要将苦难转化为成长燃料而非被其压垮的场景。

skills.name: milarepa-naked-awareness
skills.description: 米拉日巴"裸见觉性"法，用于在情绪或念头升起的刹那，直接认出觉性，不经次第。Triggers on 当事人陷入情绪漩涡、需要"看见"而非"分析"情绪、无法区分"念头"与"觉性"的场景。

skills.name: thich-nhat-hanh-compassion
skills.description: 一行禅师"慈悲拥抱"法，用于在当事人陷入愤怒、怨恨、需要与困难情绪和解的场景。Triggers on 当事人对某人生气、无法原谅、被怨恨压垮、或者需要与"困难的人"和解的场景。

skills.name: thich-nhat-hanh-mindful-breathing
skills.description: 一行禅师"正念呼吸"法，用于帮助当事人回到当下、安顿身心。Triggers on 当事人焦虑、担心未来、或被过去困住、无法安静与自己相处的场景。
